name: team-of-agents
description: Full SDLC team of specialised AI agents with orchestrator for Claude Code

plugins.name: team-of-agents
plugins.description: A full SDLC team of specialised AI agents with skills - an orchestrator that plans and dispatches subagents, frontend designer, backend engineer, Kotlin backend engineer, data analyst, UX researcher, senior engineer, DevEx, product manager, project manager, QA engineer, document writer, Kotlin/Java code reviewer, frontend code reviewer, SEO manager, and technical business analyst. Each agent has grounded expertise, a distinct communication style, and asks permission before taking any action.
